threads.label: Iran / Hormuz
threads.status_line: MOU 'largely negotiated'; Brent below $100; Iran coordinating Strait passage for 26 ships — but Iran denies nuclear commitments and US strikes continue
expand_if: Iranian uranium concession or refusal made public

threads.label: Israel / Lebanon
threads.status_line: Netanyahu announced intensification; IDF struck 70+ Hezbollah sites; Lebanon ceasefire disputed — Iran says included in deal, Israel says excluded
expand_if: Hezbollah rocket barrage on Israeli cities
US forces Israel to pause operations

threads.label: Ebola Bundibugyo — DRC / Uganda
threads.status_line: 1,010 suspected cases, 231 deaths as of 24 May — up from 746/176 two days ago; Kampala confirmed; no vaccine for Bundibugyo strain
expand_if: WHO raises to highest alert level

threads.label: Turkey — CHP / Opposition
threads.status_line: Court ousted CHP leadership (annulled 2023 congress); police stormed HQ with tear gas; Özel calls it a coup attempt; Kılıçdaroğlu may return as leader
expand_if: street protests escalate to general strike
constitutional court ruling on Imamoglu detention

threads.label: SNP Crisis / Murrell
threads.status_line: Peter Murrell guilty plea — £400K embezzled from SNP over 13 years (2010-2023); remanded in custody; sentencing 23 June
expand_if: sentencing on 23 June with significant prison term
SNP polling drops significantly in Scotland

threads.label: Venice Biennale 2026
threads.status_line: Running Apr-Nov; Palestinian pavilion drawing attention; no major new incident
expand_if: new curator statement on current events
political intervention at a national pavilion

threads.label: UK Economic Stress
threads.status_line: Brent below $100 for first time in weeks; 10Y gilt below 4.9%; but retail sales -1.3% and PMI in first contraction in a year — easing on weakness, not growth
expand_if: gilt yield spike above 5.5% with upward trajectory

threads.label: Olivia Dean / UK Chart
threads.status_line: Holds #1 (Man I Need), #2 (with Sam Fender), #5 simultaneously — all positions static for fourth consecutive week

threads.label: Tucker Carlson
threads.status_line: No new episode since May 23; anti-Trump positioning on Iran maintained; no pivot detected
expand_if: returns to pro-Trump framing on Iran
direct confrontation with White House escalates

threads.label: Mearsheimer
threads.status_line: No new Substack post since May 22; 'Eating Humble Pie' arguing Iran war is strategic loss for US remains the counter-frame
expand_if: shifts argument on a major topic

retired_threads.label: Cannes 2026
retired_threads.retired_because: Festival closed May 23 — time-bounded event, no ongoing story
retired_threads.revive_if: Mungiu or another winner makes a politically significant statement in the press circuit; or Fjord triggers a specific diplomatic controversy

source_discoveries.name: Richard Haass — 'Home & Away' Substack
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Former CFR president arguing Trump is recreating the JCPOA he destroyed, and that regime change pressure produced a more hardline Iranian government — structural counter-frame to deal optimism, sharpened by today's developments

source_discoveries.name: L'Orient Today
source_discoveries.why_interesting: English-language edition of L'Orient Le Jour; takes a meaningfully different political line from Al-Nahar on Lebanese politics; useful for south Lebanon coverage
